name: Buttered Pop Thorn
description: Buttered Pop Thorn is a movie theater counterpart of Pop Thorn in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
biography: Buttered Pop Thorn is a movie theater counterpart of Pop Thorn in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
quote: Buttered Pop Thorn has popped into Skylands!!

story.content: Buttered Pop Thorn is a movie theater counterpart of Pop Thorn in Skylanders: Lost Islands.

content: Buttered Pop Thorn has popped into Skylands!!

trivia: Buttered Pop Thorn is the first Lost Islands variant to be an Air element.
His name is a pun of the phrase 'buttered pop corn'.
He is voiced by Chris Edgerly.
gameplay: Buttered Pop Thorn is a movie theater counterpart of Pop Thorn in Skylanders: Lost Islands.
